new_classes.label_en: Tokaj Wine in Containers of 2 Litres or Less with High Actual Alcoholic Strength (CN 22042233)
new_classes.label_de: Tokajer Wein in Behältnissen bis 2 Liter mit hohem tatsächlichen Alkoholgehalt (KN 22042233)
new_classes.definition_en: Still wine bearing the Tokaj protected designation of origin (PDO), presented in containers of 2 litres or less, with an actual alcoholic strength meeting the higher-alcohol threshold specified in additional note 4(B)(b) to CN Chapter 22, classified under CN code 22042233.

coverage_explanation: The legal text for 22042233 is brief: "Tokaj" with reference to additional note 4(B)(b) to Chapter 22. Three key criteria are captured: (1) Tokaj PDO via hasGeographicOriginQuality → TokajDesignationOfOrigin, (2) container volume ≤ 2 L via maxContainerVolumeL ≤ 2, and (3) CN code string 22042233. The fourth criterion — the specific actual alcoholic strength threshold defined in additional note 4(B)(b) — cannot be fully formalised because the exact numeric threshold from that note is not reproduced in the provided legal text excerpt. The class label and definition reference it, but an explicit decimalRange restriction on alcoholByVolumePercent cannot be set without knowing the precise boundary value from note 4(B)(b). This gap reduces coverage to approximately 0.72.
